Column description: There are two trays for AGHY and one for ELVI
There are two species, AGHY (Agrostis hymalis) and ELVI (Elymus virginicus)
Seeds were sourced from four populations JLP (Jean Laffitte Park), LPEF (Lost Pines), PALM (Palmetto State Park), SJC (Ecolab property (owner Andy Stilley astilleypb72@gmail.com))
Endophyte status, E+ (endophyte present), E- (endophyte absent)
Site that each soil came from BAS (Bastrop), BFL (Brackenridge Field Laboratory), HUN (Huntsville)
Row of tray (A , B, C, D, E, F, or G)
Position of each plant within a tray, a combination of Var 1 and Var 2
Date each seedling was transplated from agar to a conetainer of soil within a tray
census of alive and dead plants taken on Jan 8, 2025. Dead plants were replaced if possible
When an plant dies, it is replaced in the experiment. In this clolumn the date that the new plant is planted is recoded
